view_meta: The credential engine — sync sources & drift, reach coverage, and the resolution audit (authN metadata only, no secrets · TG-107).
purpose: CREDENTIALS surface (configuration domain, epic TG-107): the operator window onto the credential engine, rendered LIVE from the read-only /v1/credentials/{sources,coverage,resolutions} read surface (spec/006 REQ-526). Three honest sections — (1) sync sources: one row per source with plane badge, ok/partial/failed outcome chip, relative last-synced, added/changed/removed drift, covered-target count, and non-secret err text (OpenBao's failed source renders truthfully as a red FAILED chip + tinted row + its err); (2) coverage — 'what can TG reach?': per-plane and per-source resolved/ambiguous/unresolved stacked bars + tallies over the window, plus recent-resolved vs recent-refused frontier lists; (3) resolution log: the per-target audit table (target/plane/outcome/source/user/scheme/key-ref-scheme/time) with a debounced ?target= search box and ?limit= respected.
notes: Honesty contract: NO fixture — every value is fetched live at session adoption. Unauthenticated shows only the auth gate; authenticated, an unavailable endpoint (503 fail-closed) renders an honest error state and an empty spine an honest empty state, never a fabricated row (INV-15). Sealed values never appear (INV-13): the payload carries only non-secret metadata (schemes, login users, reference schemes env/file/store/vault/bao) and the surface has no control that requests or displays key material. Reuses the console design system verbatim: chip-ok/chip-warn/chip-bad outcome semantics, the map-vs-territory plane language (machine=indigo, human=steel), wrapcard/tbl/sec/empty components, and the same theme tokens — no new palette. Tables live in their own overflow-x:auto container so the page body never scrolls sideways. Live state (liveState.credSources/credCoverage/credResolutions) is populated by modules/_live/js.txt liveAdopt(); the resolution search re-fetches and re-renders in place, restoring caret focus like the knowledge surface.
verified: assemble.py rebuild byte-clean; node --check on the extracted bundle passes; hash-route #credentials registers and the three sections render (loading/empty/error states exercised against a stubbed API).
